long_description:
[COM]-kube-proxy pod is not ready [US-SOUTH-STAGE] is Triggered

TIP Situation: Observed Pod Not Ready issue in Genctl-Pod-Not-Ready
TIP Short Description: A kube-proxy-lst9x is not ready for the past 10 minutes

TIP CRN: crn:v1:::is-genctl:::us-south-ngdc-test-staging01-zone3-edge:node:dal1-qz6-sr6-rk053-s38

Segment:
    kube_cluster_name = 'us-south-ngdc-test-staging01-zone3-edge' and kube_pod_name = 'kube-proxy-lst9x'

Time:             12/04/2025 11:18 AM UTC
State:            Triggered
